description: Active Runs page — real-time monitoring dashboard for currently executing workflows with multi-run support, tabbed widget views, and event-driven updates

assertions.description: Required element 0 for state Page Structure
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is currently running

assertions.description: Required element 1 for state Page Structure
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is currently running

assertions.description: Required element 2 for state Page Structure
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is currently running

groups.description: Core structural elements required for the Active Runs page: heading, control bar, tab bar, and content area.
groups.name: Page Structure

assertions.description: Required element 0 for state Tab Navigation
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is currently running

assertions.description: Required element 1 for state Tab Navigation
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is currently running

assertions.description: Required element 2 for state Tab Navigation
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is currently running

assertions.description: Required element 3 for state Tab Navigation
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is currently running

assertions.description: Required element 4 for state Tab Navigation
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is currently running

assertions.description: Required element 5 for state Tab Navigation
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is currently running

assertions.description: Required element 6 for state Tab Navigation
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is currently running

assertions.description: Required element 7 for state Tab Navigation
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is currently running

assertions.description: Required element 8 for state Tab Navigation
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is currently running

groups.description: The tab bar provides navigation between 9 views: Dashboard, Timeline, AI Conversation, Commands, UI Bridge, Verification, Findings, Flow, and Status.
groups.name: Tab Navigation

assertions.description: Required element 0 for state Empty State
assertions.precondition: No workflows are currently running on any connected runner

assertions.description: Required element 1 for state Empty State
assertions.precondition: No workflows are currently running on any connected runner

assertions.description: Required element 2 for state Empty State
assertions.precondition: No workflows are currently running on any connected runner

groups.description: When no workflows are currently running, the page should display an informative empty state message and the refresh button should remain functional.
groups.name: Empty State

assertions.description: Required element 0 for state Dashboard Layout
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is currently running and Dashboard tab is active

assertions.description: Required element 1 for state Dashboard Layout
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is currently running and Dashboard tab is active

groups.description: When the Dashboard tab is active, the page shows a split layout with a primary widget on the left and summary cards on the right sidebar.
groups.name: Dashboard Layout

assertions.description: Required element 0 for state Summary Cards
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is currently running and Dashboard tab is active

assertions.description: Required element 1 for state Summary Cards
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is currently running and Dashboard tab is active

groups.description: The right sidebar displays clickable summary cards for detected execution widgets, each showing abbreviated status data.
groups.name: Summary Cards

assertions.description: Required element 0 for state Timeline Widget
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is currently running with steps

assertions.description: Required element 1 for state Timeline Widget
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is currently running with steps

groups.description: The Timeline widget shows step execution progress with step counts, progress bar, stage information, and current running step.
groups.name: Timeline Widget

assertions.description: Required element 0 for state AI Conversation Widget
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is running with AI conversation active

target.label: Required element for AI Conversation Widget

assertions.description: Required element 1 for state AI Conversation Widget
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is running with AI conversation active

target.label: Required element for AI Conversation Widget

assertions.description: Required element 2 for state AI Conversation Widget
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is running with AI conversation active

target.label: Required element for AI Conversation Widget

groups.description: The AI Conversation widget displays session count, message count, user message count, a 'thinking' indicator, and a last-line preview of AI output.
groups.name: AI Conversation Widget

assertions.description: Required element 0 for state Verification Widget
assertions.precondition: A workflow has completed at least one verification phase

assertions.description: Required element 1 for state Verification Widget
assertions.precondition: A workflow has completed at least one verification phase

groups.description: The Verification widget shows passed/failed verification counts and a progress bar indicating the pass rate.
groups.name: Verification Widget

assertions.description: Required element 0 for state Findings Widget
assertions.precondition: A workflow has detected at least one finding

assertions.description: Required element 1 for state Findings Widget
assertions.precondition: A workflow has detected at least one finding

groups.description: The Findings widget shows total findings count, severity breakdown (critical, high), and uses data-content-label='findings-count' for the count metric.
groups.name: Findings Widget

assertions.description: Required element 0 for state Command Widget
assertions.precondition: A workflow has executed at least one command step

assertions.description: Required element 1 for state Command Widget
assertions.precondition: A workflow has executed at least one command step

groups.description: The Command widget shows total commands executed, failure count, and type breakdown (SH for shell, CHK for checks, TST for tests).
groups.name: Command Widget

assertions.description: Required element 0 for state UI Bridge Widget
assertions.precondition: A workflow has executed at least one UI Bridge action

target.label: Required element for UI Bridge Widget

assertions.description: Required element 1 for state UI Bridge Widget
assertions.precondition: A workflow has executed at least one UI Bridge action

target.label: Required element for UI Bridge Widget

groups.description: The UI Bridge widget shows total UI Bridge actions, assertion pass counts, and the latest action name.
groups.name: UI Bridge Widget

assertions.description: Required element 0 for state Run Progress Indicators
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is currently running

target.label: Required element for Run Progress Indicators

assertions.description: Required element 1 for state Run Progress Indicators
assertions.precondition: At least one workflow is currently running

target.label: Required element for Run Progress Indicators

groups.description: When a workflow is running, the page displays status badges, phase information, and iteration count to indicate execution progress.
groups.name: Run Progress Indicators

assertions.description: Required element 0 for state Multi-Run Selector
assertions.precondition: Two or more workflows are running simultaneously

assertions.description: Required element 1 for state Multi-Run Selector
assertions.precondition: Two or more workflows are running simultaneously

groups.description: When multiple workflows are running simultaneously, a horizontal run selector bar appears allowing users to switch between runs with clicks or keyboard shortcuts.
groups.name: Multi-Run Selector

assertions.description: Required element 0 for state Real-Time Updates
Required element 1 for state Real-Time Updates

groups.description: The page uses event-driven updates via RunnerEventContext and fallback polling. Widgets update on events like task-run-update, orchestrator-state-change, ai-output, step-progress, finding_detected, and finding_resolved.
groups.name: Real-Time Updates

assertions.description: Required element 0 for state Page Purpose
Required element 1 for state Page Purpose
Required element 2 for state Page Purpose

groups.description: The Active Runs page is the real-time monitoring hub for running workflows. It provides a unified dashboard with tabbed widget views, multi-run support, keyboard navigation, and event-driven updates to track AI conversations, verification results, command execution, findings, and execution timeline.
groups.name: Page Purpose

states.description: Core structural elements required for the Active Runs page: heading, control bar, tab bar, and content area.
states.name: Page Structure

states.description: The tab bar provides navigation between 9 views: Dashboard, Timeline, AI Conversation, Commands, UI Bridge, Verification, Findings, Flow, and Status.
states.name: Tab Navigation

states.description: When no workflows are currently running, the page should display an informative empty state message and the refresh button should remain functional.
states.name: Empty State

states.description: When the Dashboard tab is active, the page shows a split layout with a primary widget on the left and summary cards on the right sidebar.
states.name: Dashboard Layout

states.description: The right sidebar displays clickable summary cards for detected execution widgets, each showing abbreviated status data.
states.name: Summary Cards

states.description: The Timeline widget shows step execution progress with step counts, progress bar, stage information, and current running step.
states.name: Timeline Widget

states.description: The AI Conversation widget displays session count, message count, user message count, a 'thinking' indicator, and a last-line preview of AI output.
states.name: AI Conversation Widget

states.description: The Verification widget shows passed/failed verification counts and a progress bar indicating the pass rate.
states.name: Verification Widget

states.description: The Findings widget shows total findings count, severity breakdown (critical, high), and uses data-content-label='findings-count' for the count metric.
states.name: Findings Widget

states.description: The Command widget shows total commands executed, failure count, and type breakdown (SH for shell, CHK for checks, TST for tests).
states.name: Command Widget

states.description: The UI Bridge widget shows total UI Bridge actions, assertion pass counts, and the latest action name.
states.name: UI Bridge Widget

states.description: When a workflow is running, the page displays status badges, phase information, and iteration count to indicate execution progress.
states.name: Run Progress Indicators

states.description: When multiple workflows are running simultaneously, a horizontal run selector bar appears allowing users to switch between runs with clicks or keyboard shortcuts.
states.name: Multi-Run Selector

states.description: The page uses event-driven updates via RunnerEventContext and fallback polling. Widgets update on events like task-run-update, orchestrator-state-change, ai-output, step-progress, finding_detected, and finding_resolved.
states.name: Real-Time Updates

states.description: The Active Runs page is the real-time monitoring hub for running workflows. It provides a unified dashboard with tabbed widget views, multi-run support, keyboard navigation, and event-driven updates to track AI conversations, verification results, command execution, findings, and execution timeline.
states.name: Page Purpose
